Hameln can not use x2 effect on Daf 4 cost card 
I guess because she generate that card on her ult
Your first card you use in a turn will be stored
After 5 turns you will enter ultra turn
that’s it
Ultra turn is basically an extra turn
Because of this Ultra unit tend to have special effect if you use their card first
Ultra team requires more planning so I don’t recommend you to play them

They are the faction of your character. Think of it just as blue, red, and purple. Yellow can be paired with any realm but caro can't be paired with anyone else besides others from red and yellow basically
Blue has the gimmick where you build up tentacles to do a bunch of damage at the end of the turn or procing the tentacles to hit (Tulu does this and is very strong)
Ultra is an extra turn for big burst
and caro eats babies to power up their ults
Investment in my eyes is the constellations and wheels.
